title: 18S V4 tag sequencing PCR amplification and library prep (Illumina)
author: Lisa Mesrop
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rfvd3n6

steps.title: Prepare PCR Reaction Mix
steps.instruction: We use Q5 High-Fidelity 2x Master Mix for our PCR reactions. The convenient 2x master mix formulation is easy to use and is suitable for PCR applications requiring greater accuracy and amplification of difficult or low genomic DNA concentrations. Depending on projects, we use anywhere between 1 ng to 10 ng input of DNA for a final concentration reaction mixture of .04 ng/ul to .4 ng/ul, respectively. Reagent Volume Stock Concentration Final Concentration Q5 High Fidelity 2x Master Mix 12.5 ul 2x 1x 18S V4 Forward Illumina Adaptor 1.25 ul 10 uM .5 uM 18S V4 Reverse Illumina Adaptor 1.25 ul 10 uM .5 uM DNA Template Variable Nuclease-Free Water To 25 ul Q5 High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix - 100 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M0492S

Depending on projects, we use anywhere between 1 ng to 10 ng input of DNA for a final concentration reaction mixture of .04 ng/ul to .4 ng/ul, respectively. Reagent Volume Stock Concentration Final Concentration Q5 High Fidelity 2x Master Mix
ul 10 uM .5 uM 18S V4 Reverse Illumina Adaptor
ul 10 uM .5 uM DNA Template Variable Nuclease-Free Water To 25 ul Q5 High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix - 100 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M0492S

steps.title: Preheat Thermocycler
steps.instruction: Ensure the thermocycler is preheated to Q5 activation temperature 98ºC. Note: Depending on template size, annealing and extension temperatures and times may vary. Please refer to BioLabs Protocol for Q5 High-Fidelity 2x Master Mix thermocycler conditions.

steps.title: Prepare AMPure XP Beads
steps.instruction: Remove Agencourt AMPure XP beads from storage and let sit out at room temperature for at least 30 minutes. Steps 3-19 can also be found with AgencourtsAMPure bead information. AMPure XP Beads Contributed by users

steps.title: Vortex AMPure XP Beads
steps.instruction: Vortex Agencourt AMPure XP beads for 1 minute to ensure the beads are evenly distributed prior to use.

steps.title: Prepare 80% Ethanol
steps.instruction: Make fresh 80% Ethanol.

steps.title: Add Beads to PCR Product
steps.instruction: Add 1:1 volume ratio of beads to PCR product (25 ul, if you're following this protocol) into each sample and pipette mix up and down 20-30x gently.

steps.title: Incubate Bead Mixture
steps.instruction: Let mixture sit at room temperature for 10-15 minutes.

steps.title: Separate Beads on Magnetic Stand
steps.instruction: Place tubes onto magnetic stand for 2 to 5 minutes and let the beads clear from solution.

steps.title: Wash Beads with Ethanol (First Wash)
steps.instruction: With the tubes on the magnetic stand, add 200 ul of freshly prepared 80% Ethanol to each sample opposite the aggregated beads being careful not to disturb them.

steps.title: Remove Supernatant (First Wash)
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes on the magnetic stand for 30 seconds and carefully remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Wash Beads with Ethanol (Second Wash)
steps.instruction: With the tubes on the magnetic stand, add 200 ul freshly prepared 80% Ethanol to each sample well opposite the aggregated beads being careful not to disturb them.

steps.title: Remove Supernatant Completely (Second Wash)
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes on the magnetic stand for 30 seconds and carefully remove the supernatant completely. Use a smaller volume pipette to remove any small amounts of ethanol collected at the bottom of the tubes.

steps.title: Air Dry Beads
steps.instruction: Critical Step - With the tubes on the magnetic stand allow the beads to air-dry for 5 to 8 minutes. Make sure beads do not over dry and begin to crack.

steps.title: Elute DNA
steps.instruction: Remove the tubes from the magnetic stand and add TE or nuclease-free water to each sample tube. Carefully pipette mix up and down for 20-30x.

steps.title: Rehydrate DNA Sample
steps.instruction: Rehydrate sample tubes for 2-5 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge Samples
steps.instruction: Centrifuge sample tubes at 280 x g for 30 sec to collect solution in each tube.

steps.title: Collect Beads Post-Centrifugation
steps.instruction: Immediately place the tubes on the magnetic stand for 2-5 minutes to allow magnetic beads to collect.

steps.title: Transfer Cleaned PCR Product
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer the supernatant to clean, labeled tubes. This is now cleaned up PCR product!

steps.title: Quantify Cleaned PCR Product
steps.instruction: QC cleaned PCR products using Qubit fluorometer (concentration) High Specificity Dye & Buffer For the Qubit, load 2ul of product to 189 ul of High Specificity Dye & Buffer Solution for each sample

steps.title: Prepare Secondary PCR Reaction
steps.instruction: We have P5 & P7 Index Primers in 5 uM stocks. Note: Make sure to normalize total input PCR product (total ng) for amplification Step 22. Reagent Volume Stock Concetration Final Concentration Q5 High Fidelity 2x Master Mix 12.5 ul 2x 1x P5 Indexed Primer 2.5 ul 5 uM .5 uM P7 Indexed Primer 2.5 ul 5 uM .5 uM DNA Template Variable Nuclease - Free Water Up to 25 ul Q5 High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix - 100 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M0492S

ul 5 uM .5 uM P7 Indexed Primer
ul 5 uM .5 uM DNA Template Variable Nuclease - Free Water Up to 25 ul Q5 High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix - 100 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M0492S
